assertion: roundtrip PASS alone cannot create emission
store change after authorization requires fresh emission authorization
PREPARED journal is durable before channel invocation
unknown delivery is not promoted to delivered/shared
no observed emitted content creates no output discourse/common ground
literal surface requires exact reviewed surface hash and graph fingerprint policy
emission audience cannot exceed Response UOL/realization audience
semantic surface mutation after authorization fails closed
common-ground records never admit propositions as world truth
SHARED common ground requires interaction evidence
follow-up output references resolve via semantic anchors, not transcript substrings
equal semantic reference candidates create a frontier rather than arbitrary choice
correction preserves historical emission and supersedes commitment/common-ground projections
selected silence is auditable without fake emission record
reported terminal operation outcomes require exact reconciliation before emission
content that left the system with unauthorized/mutated surface is preserved as a non-discourse emission anomaly
acknowledgement targets must be authorized by exact selected target-bearing goals
channel delivery advances recipient-received common ground only when the exact channel contract structurally proves recipient receipt
output discourse pins exact durable speaker and every addressee referent dependency
replacement targets belong to correcting discourse roots and opposition targets belong to prior committed targets
ambiguous output reference candidates are candidate refs, never fabricated evidence refs
submitted/unknown emission recovery is queried only when the exact channel contract authorizes recovery-query capability; it never silently resubmits
client-key idempotency mode requires a durable idempotency key in the PREPARED journal before external submit
